overview.description: Oracle Data-Driven Test with dynamic expected files
overview.name: Oracle Variations Test

oracle.comment: Create table for the current variation
oracle.query: CREATE TABLE test_news ( id NUMBER(10) PRIMARY KEY, title VARCHAR2(100), category VARCHAR2(50) )

oracle.comment: Insert dynamic data to table for news id {{id}}
oracle.query: INSERT INTO test_news (id, title, category) VALUES ({{id}}, '{{title}}', '{{category}}')

oracle.comment: Read data from table using variations
Drop table to prepare for the next variation iteration
